name: SINT Protocol
description: Installable security-first MCP proxy with policy enforcement — scan tools for risks (T0–T3 tiers), enforce approval gates, and produce hash-chained audit trails. OWASP ASI05 compliant.

tools.name: sint__status
tools.description: Inspect the current SINT runtime state before taking action. Returns a JSON summary with server connectivity, aggregated tool counts, pending approvals, and ledger size.

tools.name: sint__servers
tools.description: List configured downstream MCP servers and their live connection state. Returns a JSON array with server names, health, and discovered tool counts.

tools.name: sint__whoami
tools.description: Show the active SINT identity for the current session. Returns the acting public key, token ID, and role.

tools.name: sint__pending
tools.description: List approval requests currently blocked for review. Read-only. Use this before sint__approve or sint__deny; returns a JSON array of request IDs, resources, actions, reasons, and expiry times.

tools.name: sint__approve
tools.description: Approve one pending escalated action after review. Requires a requestId from sint__pending, records the approver identity, and returns confirmation or an error if the request is missing.

requestId.title: Approval request ID
requestId.description: Approval request ID returned by sint__pending

by.title: Approver
by.description: Human or operator identifier recorded as the approver; defaults to the current agent identity

tools.name: sint__deny
tools.description: Reject one pending escalated action so it cannot proceed. Requires a requestId from sint__pending and optionally records a denial reason.

requestId.title: Approval request ID
requestId.description: Approval request ID returned by sint__pending

reason.title: Denial reason
reason.description: Human-readable reason recorded in the audit trail and returned to the caller

by.title: Denying actor
by.description: Human or operator identifier recorded as the denying actor; defaults to the current agent identity

tools.name: sint__audit
tools.description: Read recent events from the SINT evidence ledger for debugging, compliance review, or operator context. Read-only. Returns a JSON array of recent ledger events.

limit.title: Event limit
limit.description: Maximum number of newest ledger events to return; defaults to 20

tools.name: sint__add_server
tools.description: Register and connect a new downstream MCP server while SINT is running. Requires a unique server name and startup command, and returns the discovered tool count on success or an error if connection fails.

name.title: Server name
name.description: Unique short name used as the server prefix for aggregated tools

command.title: Startup command
command.description: Executable used to start the downstream stdio server process

args.title: Command arguments
args.description: Optional command arguments passed to the downstream server process

tools.name: sint__remove_server
tools.description: Disconnect and remove one downstream MCP server from the running proxy. Requires the server name as listed by sint__servers and returns confirmation or an error if the name is unknown.

name.title: Server name
name.description: Server name as listed by sint__servers

tools.name: sint__issue_token
tools.description: Issue a new attenuated capability token for another subject. Requires subject, resource, and actions, stores the token immediately, and returns token metadata including tokenId and expiry.

subject.title: Token subject
subject.description: Public key or subject identifier that will own the new token

resource.title: Resource pattern
resource.description: Resource URI pattern the token may access

actions.title: Allowed actions
actions.description: Allowed actions for the token on that resource

expiresInHours.title: Lifetime in hours
expiresInHours.description: Token lifetime in hours; defaults to 24

tools.name: sint__revoke_token
tools.description: Revoke an active capability token so it can no longer authorize actions. Requires tokenId, records the reason in the audit trail, and returns a confirmation message.

reason.title: Revocation reason
reason.description: Reason recorded in the revocation store and ledger

tools.name: sint__interface_status
tools.description: Inspect the current operator interface state. Returns a JSON snapshot with mode, HUD panel state, and session context.

tools.name: sint__recall_memory
tools.description: Search the operator memory bank for relevant stored context. Read-only. Requires a query string and returns matching memory entries as JSON.

query.title: Search query
query.description: Search string used to match memory keys, tags, or content

limit.title: Result limit
limit.description: Maximum number of matches to return; defaults to 10

tools.name: sint__store_memory
tools.description: Store structured context in the operator memory bank for later retrieval. Requires key and value, with optional tags and persistence.

key.title: Memory key
key.description: Stable unique key for the memory entry

value.title: Memory value
value.description: Any JSON value to persist under the key

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Optional tags used for categorization and later search

persist.title: Persist beyond session
persist.description: Whether the entry should persist beyond the current session; defaults to false

tools.name: sint__speak
tools.description: Send text-to-speech output to the operator interface. Requires short text and optionally a priority level.

text.title: Spoken text
text.description: Short text that will be spoken aloud to the operator

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: Voice output priority; defaults to normal

tools.name: sint__show_hud
tools.description: Show or refresh one HUD panel in the operator interface. Requires a target panel and optionally accepts JSON data for that panel. Returns a confirmation payload with the panel name and timestamp.

panel.title: HUD panel
panel.description: HUD panel to display or refresh

data.title: Panel payload
data.description: Optional JSON payload for the panel

tools.name: sint__notify
tools.description: Send a proactive notification to the operator interface, optionally with one action button that invokes another MCP tool. Returns a confirmation payload with the notification timestamp.

message.title: Notification message
message.description: Visible notification text shown to the operator

label.title: Button label
label.description: Button label shown in the notification UI

tool.title: Tool to invoke
tool.description: MCP tool name to invoke when the button is clicked

args.title: Tool arguments
args.description: Arguments passed to the MCP tool when the action button is clicked

tools.name: sint__interface_mode
tools.description: Change how the operator interface presents information. Requires one of hud, compact, voice-only, or silent.

tools.name: sint__delegate_to_agent
tools.description: Issue a delegated capability token to a sub-agent with narrower scope than the current token. Returns token metadata including depth and expiry.

subagentId.title: Sub-agent ID
subagentId.description: Public key or stable identifier of the sub-agent receiving the delegated token

toolScope.title: Tool scope
toolScope.description: Resource URI patterns the sub-agent may access; must be a subset of the caller's scope

expiresInHours.title: Expiry (hours)
expiresInHours.description: Delegated token lifetime in hours; defaults to 4

maxCallsPerMinute.title: Rate limit (calls/minute)
maxCallsPerMinute.description: Optional per-minute rate limit applied to the delegated token

tools.name: sint__list_delegations
tools.description: List the active delegation tree rooted at the current token. Read-only. Returns a JSON array of delegation nodes and scope relationships.

tools.name: sint__revoke_delegation_tree
tools.description: Cascade-revoke a delegated token and all of its descendants. Requires the root delegated token ID and optionally a revocation reason.

rootTokenId.title: Root token ID
rootTokenId.description: Root delegated token ID whose entire subtree should be revoked

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Reason recorded for the cascade revocation
